name: suews-assistant
description: Get detailed explanations of SUEWS urban climate model parameters
long_description: The SUEWS Parameter Explainer provides comprehensive explanations for all Surface Urban Energy and Water balance Scheme (SUEWS) parameters. Get instant access to parameter descriptions, units, typical values, scientific context, and usage examples to help configure your urban climate simulations correctly.

tools.name: explain_suews_parameter
tools.description: Get detailed explanation of any SUEWS parameter with typical values and scientific context

prompts.name: parameter_guide
prompts.text: I need help understanding SUEWS parameters. Ask me which parameter I'm interested in or what aspect of the model I'm configuring, then provide detailed explanations with typical values and scientific context.
